texto: The traditional family table is round. No corners. No sides. No head. No tail. Everything is smooth. The food is in the center, and each family member reaches over the same distance. Someone you love is next to you on each side, and no one is last or at the end. The person farthest away from you is also the person facing you.
explicacao: Citação de Deng Ming-Dao sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The traditional family table is round. No corners. No sides. No head. No tail. Everything is smoo…” articula familia, love, family em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como termino e family.
